title: aspidium exaltatum
intro: Aspidium exaltatum, also known as the exalted fern or golden polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aspidium exaltatum include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting liver and kidney health. In herbal preparations, Aspidium exaltatum is often made into a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application to harness its medicinal properties.
